en_title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword Release Date Moved Forward
cn_title: 《鬼武者：剑之道》提前三周发售
subtitle: 这波是卡普空加急
opus_summary: 卡普空宣布《鬼武者：剑之道》将提前至9月4日发售。本作是系列时隔20年的回归新作，目前试玩版已在多平台上线，玩家保留存档可在正式版中获得护符奖励。

paragraphs.en: Capcom has announced that Onimusha: Way of the Sword, the upcoming action-adventure sequel for PC, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 2, will now be released earlier than previously guided: it will be available on September 4 rather than September 25.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空宣布，即将登陆PC、PS5、XBOX Series和Switch 2的动作冒险续作《鬼武者：剑之道》发售日将提前：游戏将于9月4日发售，而非此前公布的9月25日。

paragraphs.en: Onimusha: Way of the Sword is the first series entry in 20 years; Onimusha: Dawn of Dreams released for PS2 in 2006. IGN awarded it an 8.8 out of 10 review score. Way of the Sword, meanwhile, is set in Kyoto during the early Edo period, and we were quite impressed by it in our recent hands-on session at Summer Game Fest.
paragraphs.cn: 《鬼武者：剑之道》是该系列20年来首部全新作品，此前该系列的最后一部作品《鬼武者：黎明之梦》于2006年在PS2平台发售，IGN曾为其给出8.8分(满分10分)。而《鬼武者：剑之道》的背景设定在江户时代初期的京都，我们在最近举办的夏日游戏节实机试玩中对其留下了非常深刻的印象。

paragraphs.en: A demo for Onimusha: Way of the Sword is available now for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC (on both Steam and the Epic Games Store). Those who play the demo (and, crucially, have save data on their hard drive) and then buy the game will receive a Kubi Akari charm in the full release.
paragraphs.cn: 《鬼武者：剑之道》的试玩版现已登陆PS5、XBOX Series和PC（Steam及Epic Games商城）。游玩试玩版（且关键是硬盘中留有存档数据）并购买游戏的玩家，将在正式版中获得「Kubi Akari」护符。

paragraphs.en: Onimusha: Way of the Sword looks to continue a big 2026 for Capcom, who enjoyed great reviews and huge sales numbers for Resident Evil Requiem earlier this year.
paragraphs.cn: 《鬼武者：剑之道》有望延续卡普空在2026年的强劲势头。今年早些时候，他们凭借《生化危机：安魂曲》收获了极高评价与巨大销量。
